diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The patient presented with systemic symptoms including fevers, night sweats, and non-productive cough, along with bilateral inguinal lymphadenopathy. Investigations revealed elevated ESR, ACE, IgG, IgM, and total protein. CT-PET confirmed high avidity lymphadenopathy in the mediastinum and abdominal chains, and lymph node aspirate demonstrated non-necrotising granulomatous inflammation. No alternative aetiology was identified, leading to the clinical diagnosis of sarcoidosis.
